nasb.text: “For on the day that I punish Israel’s transgressions, I will also punish the altars of Bethel; The horns of the altar will be cut off And they will fall to the ground.

esv.text: “that on the day I punish Israel for his transgressions, I will punish the altars of Bethel, and the horns of the altar shall be cut off and fall to the ground.

cnv.text: 我追討以色列的悖逆時， 必要懲罰伯特利的祭壇； 壇角必砍下， 跌落在地。

ccb.text: 我追讨以色列人的罪时， 要摧毁伯特利的祭坛， 将祭坛的角砍落在地。
